## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with [x] -->
- [ ] Code follows copilot-instructions.md coding standards
- [ ] StyleCop copyright header added to all new `.cs` files
- [ ] Full XML documentation on all public members
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] No underscore prefix on private fields
- [ ] Using statements placed below namespace declaration
- [ ] ConfigureAwait(false) used in all library async methods
- [ ] Structured logging used (no string interpolation in log messages)
- [ ] SOLID principles verified for new classes
- [ ] No new NuGet packages with commercial licenses introduced
- [ ] Layer dependency rules respected (plugins depend on Core only)

- [ ] Tested with real JSON files
